calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Nichole Rodich, #11604.

William E. Joost, Jr., Esq. appeared with plaintiff Lillie Jue, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Dae Won & Associates, Inc., Dae Wong Yoon or Soon Ae Yoon, dba F&H Delight.
Defaults were entered against defendants Dae Wong Yoon and Soon Ae Yoon, dba F&H Delight, on June 3, 2008.
Default was entered against defendant Dae Won & Associates, Inc. on September 8, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 16, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Lillie Jue and against the Defaulted Defendants Dae Won & Associates, Inc. Dae Wong Yoon and Soon Ae Yoon, dba F&H Delight as follows:

Damages/Principal - $157,181.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $11,309.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $545.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $169,035.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
